scripts.build: elm-review && elm-format --validate elm/Main.elm && elm make elm/Main.elm --optimize --output=js/elm.js && esbuild js/entrypoint.js --bundle --format=iife --sourcemap --outfile=js/entrypoint.bundle.js && terser js/elm.js js/entrypoint.bundle.js --compress 'pure_funcs=[F2,F3,F4,F5,F6,F7,F8,F9,A2,A3,A4,A5,A6,A7,A8,A9],pure_getters,keep_fargs=false,unsafe_comps,unsafe' --mangle --source-map "content=js/entrypoint.bundle.js.map,includeSources,url=app.js.map,filename=static/app.js.map" --output static/app.js
scripts.build-debug: elm make elm/Main.elm --debug --output=js/elm.js && esbuild js/entrypoint.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=js/entrypoint.bundle.js && cat js/elm.js js/entrypoint.bundle.js > static/app.js
